---
title: "Harnessing LLM in Clinical Research: From Single Prompt to Agentic Coding Interface"
subtitle: "A Systematic Literature Review"
date: "2026-03-28"
author: "Automated Literature Review Pipeline"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    cite-method: citeproc
    documentclass: article
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
    linestretch: 1.5
  docx:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
bibliography: references.bib
csl: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/american-medical-association.csl
---

## Abstract {.unnumbered}

{{< include sections/00-abstract.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/01-introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/02-methods.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/03-prompt-and-rag.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/04-clinical-applications.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/05-evidence-synthesis.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/06-agentic-interfaces.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/07-safety-ethics.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/08-discussion.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/09-declarations.qmd >}}

# References

::: {#refs}
:::
